programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Seamus and Little Woo are spotting wildlife in the woods, so Stanley builds them a special camouflaged den so they can watch quietly and not scare the creatures.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Scared Sperm Whale
programme.desc: A timid sperm whale must conquer his fears and dive deep down to help the Octonauts release Peso from a giant clam.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: An asteroid heads for earth, with the power to turn our heroes into villains. But help arrives from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee has made a delicious apple pie. He puts it on the windowsill to cool down - but the second his back is turned it's gone. Who took it? Fortunately, Duggee has his Detective Badge and follows some small footprints.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: King Tide's Castle: Neville builds an epic sandcastle and makes himself king, but forgets that a king tide is forecast for Kangaroo Beach.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Mandy and Mike, Sarah and James, Hannah and Joe, and Norman and Jodie try to win Malcolm's Wildlife Photo Challenge.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Broken Bed
programme.desc: Beatrix Potter's classic character returns and explores new destinations, thrilling adventures and fabulous fun with a cast of furry friends.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around The World
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, the Mini Makers help create a brilliant bug picture; in Australia, find out how to make some jolly Jellyfish with drippy paint and in the UK we see if Mister Maker can make a paper plate hat in under a minute.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: John's baby nephew visits The Wiggles and they discover he has a temperature. Will Dr. Steffi Scope be able to help? Then sing and count along with 'Five Little Monkeys Jumping on the Bed'.

programme.title: Play School: Big Ted's Time Machine
programme.desc: Kaeng and Luke time travel into the future and find lots of gadgets and gizmos. They see flying cars and use the Zapizoover 5000! They're joined by guest, Kirli Saunders to plant native seeds for future generations to enjoy!

programme.title: Stick Man
programme.desc: Join Stick Man on his incredible journey across the seasons as he runs from a playful dog, gets thrown in a river, escapes from a swan's nest and even ends up on top of a fire. Will he get back to his family in time for Christmas?

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Otto and Oren compete for votes to become Captain Fun.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Switch Your Partner Round and Round
programme.desc: Olive and Otto discover what life would have been like if they had different partners.

programme.title: Dino Dex
programme.desc: When Dad is getting ready for a job interview, Dex and Kayla inspire him to change his outfit as they perform a dino experiment.

programme.title: Little J & Big Cuz
programme.desc: Will Little J and Levi find treasure - and has Big Cuz lost Nanna's treasure forever?

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: In Kakadu, Traditional Owners welcome Clarence and invite him to join them as they weave pandanus. They carefully harvest the leaves, then they get busy dyeing, drying, and finally weaving them into beautiful creations.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the festival is covered in mud. Luckily, Miss Rabbit is prepared with lots of muddy activities.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! They decide to go and pick their own at Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm. Granny and Grandpa eat one too many strawberries and end up very full, but everyone has a wonderful day together at the strawberry farm.

programme.title: The Scarecrows' Wedding
programme.desc: An enchanting story about two devoted scarecrows, Betty O’Barley and Harry O’Hay, who are planning a wedding to remember. When Harry insists on leaving the farm to collect one last thing for their big day, a smooth-talking scarecrow named Reginald Rake swoops in with plans of his own. Chaos ensues, and soon, Betty is in danger and everything’s at risk. Can Harry get back in time and save the day? Full of heart, humour and adventure, this is the joyful tale about loyalty, love and learning that the most important thing isn’t a grand gesture – it’s simply being together. This half-hour animated special features an all-star voice cast with returning favourite Rob Brydon (Gavin and Stacey, The Trip) voicing Reginald Rake, Jessie Buckley (Wicked Little Letters, Wild Rose) as Betty O’Barley and Domhnall Gleeson (About Time, The Paper) as Harry O’Hay, all led by Sophie Okonedo (Slow Horses, Hotel Rwanda) as the narrator.

programme.title: Super Monsters
programme.desc: The Super Monsters' chaotic restaurant takeover turns into a heartfelt lesson in teamwork and gratitude.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts get more than they bargained for when they use the Octopod to transport a pair of invasive lionfish back to their native habitat.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The spies try to stop Scarlett's homework being fed to the family dog Mazey, but can Deena learn how to bond with the beloved pet?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Emerald
programme.desc: Emerald and the Shimmerlings: In a special double episode, Emerald and Delphina find rare Shimmerlings deep in the ocean who need their help.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea asks for flying lessons when Broccoli flies her paper plane into her freezer. Evil Pea doesn't let Broccoli know that she intends to fly high to take over Tato Tower.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: After Pancake is enraged by Nugget’s behaviour, Looph invents a special headset to show him special memories - and reveal what life might be like if he had never met his best friend.

programme.title: Let's Go, Bananas!
programme.desc: Apple is worried about her dads leaving her with a babysitter on their date night. But she has a solution - she will join them!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway order, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad’s patience.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: For this challenge, Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are honouring the school library by asking the young bakers to create book desserts. They can make any dessert, as long as it's decorated to look like a book!

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: Hosts Camila Alves and Eddie Jackson meet eight of the fiercest kid barbecue cooks in the country and kick off the competition.

programme.title: Caper Crew
programme.sub-title: Conning is More Art Than Science
programme.desc: The Joeys audition for the school play to gain access to the Academy Archives. But Penelope's got to overcome stage fright if they're going to get close.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is in a trance – barks like a dog and starts to dance.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean builds a car washing machine that attracts all manner of customers.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Things are looking up for the Huangs when Louis gets the restaurant a billboard in a prime spot in Orlando, but repeated vandalism causes issues. Meanwhile, Eddie works hard to get the attention of the girl he's crushing on.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Eddie tries to befriend the only other Chinese kid in school, but he's in for a letdown after he finds out that they have nothing in common. Meantime, Louis feels betrayed when Mitch accepts a job at the rival Golden Saddle.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: It's a new year at Abbott Elementary, and Janine plans a district-wide Career Day. Meanwhile, Ava has a new approach to her job, and Melissa is asked a surprising question.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.sub-title: The Coming of Arthur: Part Two
programme.desc: Queen Morgana begins a reign of terrible evil over the innocent citizens of Camelot. With Morgause's immortal army at her command, it seems there is no hope for Uther, who must watch his Kingdom crumble under his daughter.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: Roll up roll up, Mr Grumbles' funfair has come to town! The doctors reveal how your eye muscles work with an unusual fairground game.

programme.title: BTN High
programme.desc: BTN High breaks down the week's biggest news stories for Aussie high schoolers.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: Humiliated by Gabriel Agreste, Chloe's mother gets akumatized into Style Queen. Armed with a sceptre and determined to get revenge, she attacks Adrien. Will Ladybug manage to stop her without Cat Noir here to help her?

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: When rain derails an outside game of catch, someone suggests they play it inside. This prompts Izzy to lead the group through her wildly imaginative worst case scenario. It's an adventure so scary that the kids many never play again.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: A thunderstorm forces Chloe to spend the night at the bears' cave. When Chloe's parents tell the bears to make sure she stays safe, they go a bit overboard.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Nom Nom is reunited with his long lost brother, Kyle.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Baby Bears sign up for a game of laser tag, hoping to win some ice cream. But the round of laser tag turns out to be less of a game and more like a war zone.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears team up with Polly the Parrot Pirate on a quest for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Feelings That Transcend Time - Trunks and Mai
programme.desc: Bulma gets to work repairing the old time machine that she's kept. Meanwhile, Future Trunks recalls his experiences with Mai. But two questions remain: why does Black have a time ring? And what's the extent of his power?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Master and Pupil Reunited! Gohan and Future Trunks
programme.desc: Repairs on the time machine continue, so Future Trunks goes to visit an old friend. However, times have changed, and the reunion isn't quite what he expected.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Girls must overcome their supersonic hiccups to stop the Gnat's latest evil plan!

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Pete auditions for dance captain, and Olive and Grace search for their place on the team.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Special guest stars Al Murray and The League Of Gentlemen's Reece Shearsmith, Mark Gatiss and Steve Pemberton join the Horrible Histories cast today for more fascinating facts, mirthful music and gruesome gags.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Freaky Frequency
programme.desc: When the ice-cream shop loses business because customers can't lock their cars, the Inbestigators must uncover why all the car keys in the area have stopped working.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this two part episode, the tube system breaks and Olive and Otto are left stranded in a dan-gerous forest.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Otto and Oscar try to stop Olive from turning into a pirate.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi join a friend in a wilderness adventure.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: When Newton turns his back on his space powers, Luna exploits him to get back to the moon.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Carly needs all the trains to help with a very big delivery - relocating three cottages to the other side of Sodor! They must work in pairs to deliver one cottage each. When Thomas gets paired with Diesel, he's sad he doesn't get to work with his best friend Percy, who is delivering another cottage with Nia. Can Thomas and Diesel complete their delivery or will Thomas be too distracted without his best friend?

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: Paani and an injured skua are carried away by a previously undiscovered river of melting ice. Dashi and Natquik scramble to save them before they plummet down a monstrous waterfall!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Dwarf Mine: Strange holes are appearing throughout the Little Kingdom, the Dwarves have awoken deep underground and are digging for treasure!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa tries to look at flowers, and in Tummy Tales a game of hide-and-seek is played.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo and his friends are singing about hair! They all sing together about how hair is part of what makes each of them special no matter how it grows.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Miss Elaina swims across the pool without her pool noodle, doing it a little bit at a time.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: B1 can't get to sleep because of a loud dripping tap. He's worried it will wake B2 so he calls Plumber Rat to help fix it. Rat calls the Teddies to assist but no one can work out how to stop the tap from dripping!

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: It's Lulu's birthday and the Bananas want to buy her the perfect present, but everything they want to give her, she's already got, or someone else is giving to her. Finally they hit upon a unique idea. #Bananas25.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula are painting in the garden. Bing accidentally knocks the water over and tries to refill it, but he turns it on too fast and the hose turns into a big snake, covering them in wet paint!

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Building is lots of hard work - laying bricks, pouring concrete and framing up. Fizzy and Suds go on site with some tradies to see how it's all done. What an adventure!

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and her family attend the funfair, but Mummy Pig becomes upset when the people there tell her she won't be able to win competition prizes; George overcomes his fear of heights by riding on the helter-skelter.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Count along to 'One, Two, Three, Four, Five', and join the fun! Paloma the Mermaid is visiting today but Lucia, Simon, and Lachy have lost their Wiggle. Can Tsehay help them find it before she arrives?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer gets his wish for some peace and quiet when Shaun becomes hypnotised by Mowermouth the goat and finally stops bothering him. But with the whole Flock under the influence of Mowermouth’s powerful gaze, Bitzer soon realises just how much he needs his old buddy.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: The villains steal Black Panther's super battery and cause trouble in the city.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built an incredible, full sized sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to have it for herself.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum takes the children for a lesson in the woods and uses magic to transform herself into a frog.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: When Por Por comes to visit, Flower has a sleepover with her in the restaurant. But Por Por's snoring soon proves to be too much to handle!

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: Flower wants new toys, but Penny says she has too many. Flower decides to give away her old stuff and discovers that sharing sparks unexpected fun for herself and all her friends.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Fernie loses his favorite book.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After seeing an advert for the London Marathon, Daddy Pig applies to take part to show the kids what grit and determination really looks like! So, Peppa and George step in to help train him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After finding out Daddy Pig has a place in the London Marathon, Peppa and George help Daddy Pig become stronger with lots of different, though not all typical, exercises.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum to make up. Now Bluey must find a way to play Ground's Lava with Bingo and deliver the letter to Mum, without squabbling.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo are playing \.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The spies play a series of games against Silver Paw, trying to win back the dominoes she's stolen from the kids' domino run.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Everyone wants to win Swoppiton’s hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to put it back together without the seeker spotting them!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Happy is looking for a puddle he can splash in. He finds one that's green and smelly but it's \.

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: In Kakadu, Traditional Owners welcome Clarence and invite him to join them as they weave pandanus. They carefully harvest the leaves, then they get busy dyeing, drying, and finally weaving them into beautiful creations.

programme.title: Play School: When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Teo and Michelle are joined by Nate Byrne for the Play School Jobs Expo where Humpty is searching for a job. Michelle dresses up as a bus driver and Nate tells the story of Kiya and Maurice inventing a Supersonic Solar Car!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James plans a cafe makeover for the Wholefish Cafe, he becomes over-zealous which leads to a series of events that cause a fire. / On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along.

programme.title: Builder Brothers' Dream Factory
programme.desc: The Dream Factory Crew builds a pigeon coop to house a bunch of wandering pigeons that 'invaded' the Dream Factory.

programme.title: Millie Magnificent
programme.desc: Millie helps Maya find a new home for some old toys by creating a toy shop and a life-sized game on their sidewalk.

programme.title: Tiddler
programme.desc: The story of a little fish with a big imagination who gets lost in the deep wide ocean until he's saved by his own storytelling.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Missing Appalams
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay are detectives today. When the homemade appalams go missing under their watch, they need to solve the case and save lunch!

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Alien Elephant
programme.desc: When Nikhil and Jay find a tiny elephant, they have very different ideas about what to do with it; Jay wants it to play alien spaceships and Nikhil wants it to go into his museum.

programme.title: Bananas In Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat loves the taste of the Bananas' home-made lemonade and is determined to find out their secret recipe.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Gabrielle, and Rosita join a basketball team! When Coach Jones start calling Rosita, \.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: When Captain Feathersword starts making silly sounds, the Wiggles turn to Dr. Knickerbocker to help them understand what he's saying.

programme.title: Andy and the Band
programme.desc: Odd Sock Mimi needs help to run her cafe as there's a mystery reviewer! Andy cooks up a storm in the kitchen, but Cousin Mac's new invention may not be a recipe for success!

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wub Wub Beep Bop? Come and be Moon Monsters with Kaeng and Emma using their imagination to feel and explore the music in outer space.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberblocks play dominoes and try to reach the golden double six domino and win a prize. They learn about the different patterns on the faces.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig brings some seeds for Peppa and George to grow a garden. Daddy Pig makes himself useful by being the scarecrow.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri loves to swing on vines, but one day a vine breaks and she flies through the air and gets stuck in a tree. Who is going to rescue her?

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: During a game of I Spy, Ginger spots something that none of the Peas can see.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: On a tour of the Elf Factory, the Elf and Fairy children learn about recycling and see how rubbish is re-used and made into toys. When the factory runs out of raw material, they set out to find some more.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Vida helps Sunny taste new things at the Sweetwood Food Festival.

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: It's bath time in Higgledy-Piggledy, but Triggs can't find his bath toy, Denis the Ducky. They embark on a bubble-tastic submarine adventure to the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs are camping in the woods with Dad.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Fifi's sunbell flower needs protecting so it can grow.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Long-arm Squid
programme.desc: Peso and Kwazii venture down to the midnight zone to help a hurt creature.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: An Yu feels that something is up and joins Newton and the PJ Masks who are still looking for a way to keep the asteroid and its power of Badness away.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is sewing a snazzy poncho. The squirrels want to make one too. They all get down to some sewing.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Gemma can't wait to explore on Snorkelling Day, but her snorkel gets in the way. Frizzy is being distracting while the cadets learn how to stay calm in the water, but in the end, it's Frizzy who teaches Gemma how to relax.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Which team will win Malcolm's Wildlife Photo Challenge - Mandy and Mike, Sarah and James, Hannah and Joe, or Norman and Jodie?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The One Who Got Away
programme.desc: When Peter and friends encounter the legendary 'Jack Sharp', a large trout that even Peter's father failed to catch, they try to reel the fish in once and for all. But catching a fish is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around The World
programme.desc: In Australia, we find out if he can make a recycled robot in under a minute; in South Africa we discover how to make fabulous fireworks from pipe cleaners and paint; and the UK Mini Makers help create a canal boat scene.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: The Wiggles are a having a singing lesson today, singing a gentle song called 'Butterfly, Fly Butterfly,' but Captain Feathersword is having trouble singing softly. Will Captain find his quiet voice?

programme.title: Play School: Let's Eat
programme.desc: You're invited to dine with Play School! A special episode supporting children and families to build a lifelong friendship with food and celebrate its vital role in sustaining healthy bodies and happy minds!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit: The Tale Of The Missing Egg
programme.desc: When Jemima's new egg goes missing, only Peter Rabbit is able to put the clues together and find the culprit. But can he find the egg before it hatches, or has he finally met his match in the devious newcomer Samuel Whiskers?

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this two part episode, the tube system breaks and Olive and Otto are left stranded in a dan-gerous forest.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this two part episode, the tube system breaks and Olive and Otto are left stranded in a dan-gerous forest.

programme.title: Dino Dex
programme.desc: Dex and Kayla try to solve Dino Experiment 1017 \.

programme.title: Little J & Big Cuz
programme.desc: Little J can’t wait to perform the Chinese Lion Dance with his friend at the school culture concert. Big Cuz’s nerves are getting the best of her, so she teams up with Kirra. Big Cuz is in for a big surprise!

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: Hannah and the kids are inspired by a mural in a community garden by a local French artist, Hugues Sineux. They paint pots and add plants to complement the artwork and make the green space even more beautiful.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a celebratory meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and friends visit a petting farm, where they enjoy feeding chickens and meeting cute and squeaky guinea pigs, and they all learn it's important to wash your hands after handling the little animals.

programme.title: Bluey's Big Play
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo pull out all the stops to try to get Dad off his phone in their first live stage show, brought to life by brilliant puppets and featuring brand new original music.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Leafy Sea Dragons
programme.desc: Two young leafy sea dragons are accidentally brought onboard the Octopod.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: When Silver Paw takes over Lauchie and Scarlett’s new cubby, Jeremy and Deena must step in to stop it from turning into her wicked hideout.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Lucky’s Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Emerald
programme.desc: When strange things start happening at the palace, Emerald assumes Delphina is the prankster. Determined to catch Delphina in the act she enlists the help of Shelly to set a trap for her.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: It’s potato time for Roly, and Billy takes the Big Bug Ball in a new musical direction.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: It's the Tin Can Games and Evil Pea wants to win the Tin Can Trophy. She cheats in the final race by putting a magnet on Supertato's back to stop him from going super fast.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Emperor Penguin visits the berg’s lookout to shed his feathers in private. But when he gets locked out in the buff, the Piris must come to the rescue to spare his blushes.

programme.title: Let's Go, Bananas!
programme.desc: On Mum-and-Daughter Day, Stellar and her mum have different ideas about how to spend the day: dressing-up as princesses or digging-up dinosaurs!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Perplexing Painting
programme.desc: When Esther's painting is damaged during the Art Show, Maudie has trouble proving who ruined the artwork without finding the evidence first.

programme.title: Caper Crew
programme.desc: It's Sparts Day at Woodspring Academy. The Joeys compete to win the Sparts trophy - which they suspect holds a clue to the Nug's whereabouts within.

programme.title: Secrets at Red Rocks
programme.desc: Jake and Jessie must use all their smarts to find a gravely ill Ted and get him to safety. But now Jake has lost the skin and Cara is desperate.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben and Kate return to Longleat, where a lion needs surgery to amputate part of his tail. Kate gets a surprise with the Eland babies, and Ben has a brush with a gorilla.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: When one of the park's pygmy goats unexpectedly goes into labour, it's a worrying time for the keepers. And Ben is helping the keepers sex their young pancake tortoises.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo
programme.desc: Babies at the zoo! Meet adorable bouncy baby goats, a trio of fluffy flamingo chicks, a sweet baby gazelle, and a feisty eland calf at the Wilds.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Merlin faces his toughest challenge yet when Morgana's blinkered determination threatens not only Arthur's future, but the very balance of the world.

programme.title: The Pets Factor
programme.desc: Cat is given the run-a-round by some alpacas, James finds the root of Diego the Chihuahua's painful problem and Cheryl gets a visit from one of her favourite patients.

programme.title: BTN High
programme.desc: BTN High covers the big topics in the news for high school students across different year levels and subject areas. BTN High gives students a voice in the news, enabling them to talk about topics they care about, share their experiences, and learn more about what's going on around them.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.sub-title: Queen Wasp: The Queen's Battle - Part 2
programme.desc: After transforming into Queen Bee to try and impress her mother, Chloe gets akumatized into Queen Wasp. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir manage to stop this superhero turned supervillain?

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: Owen worries he will lose his best friend after Noah goes through a growth spurt, so Owen decides to take major action.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: A doctor tells the Bears to go on a cleanse to improve their health. But when Grizz realises he can only eat what grizzly bears eat, he starts to lose his mind.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Ranger Tabes is devastated and quits her job when she accidentally wounds a defenseless animal, but Grizzly, Panda and Ice Bear wish for her to return to work and try to come up with a plan that will persuade her to come out of retirement.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz helps Ranger Tabes and the Poppy Rangers play a game of kickball against their rivals.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: Baby geniuses want Ice Bear to attend their prestigious school, but without Grizz and Panda.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Uncover Black's Identity! Off to the 10th Universe's World of the Kai's!
programme.desc: The nature of Black's power remains a mystery, so Whis, Beerus, and Goku go to the 10th Universe to find answers. Will challenging an apprentice Supreme Kai really help with the investigation? Goku seems to think so.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: He Who Is Of Saiyan Blood Trunk's Resolve
programme.desc: The time machine repairs are finishing up. Vegeta and Future Trunks go training, but the extent of Vegeta's power is unlike anything Future Trunks has ever seen.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Mojo kidnaps the girls' favourite snuggle toys, he gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: No longer Dance Captain, Anthony finds following orders difficult. Jett and Ariana try to be friends again while Heath's history with Daisy complicates things with Pascale.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Roman emperor Caesar Augustus reveals the lazy secret of his success; TV's most excitable reporter, Bob Hale, explains the very, very complex history of WW2; and Welsh hero Owain Glyndwr takes on the English in battle.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Oscar accidentally turns himself into a couch.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when one of Oscar's Oscarbots malfunctions.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Pokemon Legends: Arceus & The Year Ahead In Games!
programme.desc: We check out the huge new open world Pokemon adventure in Pokemon Legends: Arceus, plus we go through what big games of 2022 we're looking forward to most!

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi join a friend in a wilderness adventure.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Romeo resents the PJs new animal powers, so he invents some robotic animal \.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: When Thomas and Percy volunteer to deliver a herd of cows, they realize that the cows keep wandering off on their own adventures unless the two friends can both pay better attention.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: Min is re-mapping a dried-out landscape when she uncovers some sleeping caterpillars that are going to be very hungry once they wake up and find their favorite - and only - food source is gone!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy celebrates her birthday with an Elf and Fairy party and Ben, Holly and friends are invited.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubby Custard Machine is making Tubby Custard bubbles — lots and lots of bubbles. And the Teletubbies are having fun chasing and popping them!

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rudy's favorite sweater doesn't fit him anymore so Nina suggests having a clothing drive in the neighborhood to give clothes that they don't need anymore to the people who do need them.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: During a beach party at school, Prince Wednesday spills paint on his pants and the floor! He's really upset, but telling Teacher Harriet what happened makes him feel so much better.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas have to finish dusting their house before they are allowed to play. They get distracted when the Teddies come over and lose their feather dusters. When they're found, they all play a tickling game.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat in a Hat is running a competition to attract customers to his shop; whoever guesses exactly how many beans are in the jar wins the lot. Everyone wants to win, but Rat wants to win more than anyone else.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Come and celebrate Bing’s birthday, with Bing, Sula, Pando, Coco, Amma, Flop and Charlie! Bing is so excited to show everyone how to do the Waka-oke on his brand new Waka-oke Machine! How will Bing react when Pando doesn’t do it properly?

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds meet the penguins! See them snuggle, waddle, nap, and slide. From gentoo to king penguins, it's a chilly, splashy, fishy adventure full of fun.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count through playing games at Madame Gazelle's playschool.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Count along to 'One, Two, Three, Four, Five', and join the fun! Paloma the Mermaid is visiting today but Lucia, Simon, and Lachy have lost their Wiggle. Can Tsehay help them find it before she arrives?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer has completed all of his chores and is at a bit of a loss. He's delighted when he finds out that the Flock's barn needs a good clean-up. That is, until he comes across a wonky picture that just won't hang straight.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The children want to camp out for the night in the treehouse. Mr Brown is worried he won't get sleep as the kids will be scared. Paddington wants to prove him wrong, but a lightning storm means they have to come in doors.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The Cottontail's Treetop Tumble
programme.desc: After Old Brown snatches her, Cotton-tail gets stuck up a tree. It's up to Peter, Lily and Benjamin to rescue her before either a passing Mr Tod seizes her or the angry Owl returns.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.sub-title: Pirate Robot / Owlette, the Pirate Queen
programme.desc: Gekko wants to play a pirate but is overshadowed by a pirate villain. GK wants to catch the villain, but also wants to be the best pirate! Owlette accidentally helps Pirate Robot.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: It’s Mojo versus some very pesky birds on a supersonic pizza delivery run!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Zigzag's ADHD gives her a case of the hops and she can't get anything done, Vida teaches her how to make a to-do list, and Popcorn helps her complete it just in time for a den party with her friends.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: When Penny plans to donate the restaurant's Lost and Found to charity, Flower sets out to reunite the lost items with their owners before they're gone for good.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is a new friend for Peppa at her playgroup, Lotte Lama. She can speak a foreign language. Peppa loves talking, everyone loves talking.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkey jocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: A Baby Kiwimammathus gets stuck on a small patch of fast-melting snow. Its soft feet means it can't move across hard surfaces, so Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes must come up with a clever plan to get her back home.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The Beach Race: Gemma is determined to win the Kangaroo Beach junior triathlon, score a trophy and most importantly, beat the pants off Pounce. But an emergency breaks out during the race.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder helps other chefs at an event.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: Octonauts and the Baby Sea Turtles
programme.desc: As newborn baby sea turtles make their way to the ocean, the Octonauts must steer them clear of a giant wave and hungry predators.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Zara and Maya serve Mermaid Pizza and mystery tea in a joyful, sugar-filled cafe full of family fun and Queensland flair.

programme.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers Justine and Kaeng go on an adventure to explore the amazing animals of the rainforest! They use binoculars to spot animals hiding high in the trees, paint colourful butterflies, and dress up like a cassowary!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: When Silver Paw tries to fly to the moon in a bottle rocket, Jeremy and Squash take to the skies to save her.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Seamus & Little Woo are going on holiday so Stanley offers to give them a ride… but oh no, they've got the day wrong. So disappointing, but Stanley can fix it by giving them a brilliant holiday in the local community!

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Alien Elephant
programme.desc: When Nikhil and Jay find a tiny elephant, they have very different ideas about what to do with it; Jay wants it to play alien spaceships and Nikhil wants it to go into his museum.

programme.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programme.desc: Roar! After looking at a book about dinosaurs, the Nature Explorers have dinos on the brain.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: When Pants can't keep up with Mittens and Yogurt in hide-and-seek, he goes to Mayor Sourdough for advice.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa learns that when you say sorry you need to truly mean it.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups visit a sports stadium to fulfil Spin's dream of becoming an Olympic medal winner. Will the sports coach be able to help the Mixmups find a way for everyone to be a winner?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie prepares for a visit to the dentist by learning about the special tools, what the dentist does and how to relax in the big chair.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Playing Butterflies in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo’s heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds bounce with kangaroos in the outback! They explore super hops, big feet, pouch pockets, and cosy homes for joeys. A kangaroo playdate sounds like so much fun! Boing!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: One Woman Band: How lucky that Nim is better at making things than she is at music! Today she creates a paper plate llama picture, dino pizza pockets and a cardboard car park. (S2, ep 15).

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Simon has jumped out of bed and he can't stop jumping, it's so much fun! Join in and 'Let's jump like a Kangaroo!' Then join Evie and Lucia for Wiggly World of Dance for some beautiful ballet dancing.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.sub-title: Andy and the Weedy Sea Dragon
programme.desc: When Andy finds a newly hatched weedy sea dragon, will he manage to snap the perfect photo of it and make it back before the opening of the exhibition?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo’s chopper top. Now they’ve been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou can’t sleep. Pania says she will sing them a song, but only if they stay awake for the whole thing.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas get trapped in an underwater cave with a pack of inflated Lycheemodus!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Elves and Nanny Plum are busy clearing up all the leaves. Suddenly the squirrels arrive with a mission to store acorns in the Great Elf Tree, but the Wise Old Elf has a cunning idea to rid the tree of the acorns.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Daphne brags about her clean teeth on Dental Day, but Vida spots a dirty tongue!

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs shoot for the stars in an intergalactic space adventure.

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: While crunching leaves in the garden, Maddie and Triggs make a new friend named Reginald the Caterpillar. Reginald tells them all about where he lives and what he eats.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Myrtle has taken Sophie and Benjamin to the beach to build sandcastles, but she hasn't quite mastered the art!

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Fiddler Crabs
programme.desc: The Octonauts help clean up a beach after a storm, but things get complicated when the resident fiddler crabs hijack the Gup-D!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: The PJ Masks try and recover a piece of the Evil asteroid from Ivan's pyjamas before he puts them on and turns bad!
